finding: Evidence acceptance must fail closed unless the provenance signature, artifact digest binding, trusted builder and source identities, expected build type, recognized external parameters, and the separate claim-evidence check all pass.

observed_requirements: match the statement subject to the artifact digest
check canonical source, buildType, and externalParameters

primary_sources.observed_requirement: bind a predicate to named subjects by digest
cryptographic verification is a distinct operation from parsing an attestation

verification.result: 5 passed, 0 failed in isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
cases: claim evidence failure kept separate from provenance acceptance
missing checks rejected instead of defaulting true

evidence_strength: direct deterministic test of committed logic; repository CI not yet observed
uncertainty: The gate consumes verification booleans; it does not itself perform cryptographic signature verification or validate the scientific truth of a claim.
falsification_route: Any test failure, acceptance when a required check is false or missing, or production integration that maps an unverified result to true falsifies the implementation claim.
